summary: Comprehensive testing of Staff Attendance & Salary Management App completed. All backend APIs (26 tests) passed. Frontend UI working with one minor bug fixed. All core features functional: Dashboard, Staff CRUD, Attendance marking, Salary calculation (30-day basis), Monthly Report, and Advance management.

ui_bugs.issue: Date formatting error when joining_date is empty - FIXED

integration_issues.issue: Calendar date selection sometimes doesn't update form state properly, resulting in empty joining_date
integration_issues.note: Staff can still be created, date just shows as '-' in table

issues: Some advance records show 'Unknown' for staff name when staff is deleted - orphaned records

passed_tests: Staff CRUD - Create, Read, Update, Delete
Staff - Get by ID, Get all, Non-existent returns 404
Attendance - Get by month and date
Advances - Get by staff, Get by month
What's New and App Version endpoints
Frontend - Staff Master page with table
Frontend - Add Staff modal and form
Frontend - Top navigation between all tabs
action_items: OPTIONAL: Investigate date picker calendar component - date selection sometimes doesn't update form state
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: StaffList.jsx line 135 - Added null check for joining_date to prevent RangeError on empty dates

success_rate.frontend: 95% (All pages load, one minor date picker issue)

seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_staff_attendance_app.py cover Staff CRUD, Attendance, Salary (30-day basis), and Advances. Minor fix applied to StaffList.jsx for empty date handling. Electron setup exists at /app/electron/ for desktop app generation.
